result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a websocket-rpc client for the browser

Usage:
  websocket-rpc-net-client [options]

Options:
  --source <source>  Directory of the C# source code generate client from
  --output <output>  Directory to put generated JavaScript sources
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
